'''sapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombically|zombically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombically|zombically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sapate|sapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sapatesher|sapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapatesherĂ«m|sapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sapatero|sapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sapateshĂ«|sapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapateshĂ«m|sapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisapatero|gokisapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisapateshĂ«|gokisapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapateshĂ«m|gokisapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosapankerom|gosapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosapankeshĂ«|gosapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosapankeshĂ«m|gosapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosapankeya|gosapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sapaterom|sapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapatemu|sapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sapateya|sapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisapaterom|gokisapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapatemu|gokisapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisapateya|gokisapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sapapate|sapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sapapatesher|sapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapapatesherĂ«m|sapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sapapatero|sapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sapapateshĂ«|sapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapapateshĂ«m|sapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisapapatero|gokisapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisapapateshĂ«|gokisapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapapateshĂ«m|gokisapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosapapankerom|gosapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosapapankeshĂ«|gosapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosapapankeshĂ«m|gosapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosapapankeya|gosapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sapapaterom|sapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapapatemu|sapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sapapateya|sapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisapapaterom|gokisapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapapatemu|gokisapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisapapateya|gokisapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠte|sĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠtesher|sĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠtero|sĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠpĂŠtero|gokisĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠterom|sĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠtemu|sĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠteya|sĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠpĂŠterom|gokisĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠpĂŠteya|gokisĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safpafte|safpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safpaftesher|safpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safpaftesherĂ«m|safpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safpaftero|safpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safpafteshĂ«|safpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safpafteshĂ«m|safpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafpaftero|gokisafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafpafteshĂ«|gokisafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafpafteshĂ«m|gokisafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafpafnkerom|gosafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafpafnkeshĂ«|gosafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafpafnkeshĂ«m|gosafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafpafnkeya|gosafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safpafterom|safpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safpaftemu|safpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safpafteya|safpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafpafterom|gokisafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafpaftemu|gokisafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafpafteya|gokisafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
